title: Craps
_payout_note: Same economy rules as slots — max 5x payout, common outcomes push (stake refund), rare wins. Hardways (matching dice) win; rare sums (3, 4, 9, 10, 11) push (refund stake); middle sums (5/6/7/8) forfeit to the house.
_rtp_note: Calibrated RTP ~94.4% (house edge +5.6%). Win 6/36 (16.67%), push 12/36 (33.33%), forfeit 18/36 (50%). Max win multiplier 5x.
_icon_rotation_note: Dice sit diamond-oriented (45°) so adjacent faces read as separate cubes rather than dominoes lined up along the ring.
_icon_size_note: Dice texture has a 10% transparent margin on each side (DieFaceFactory's BoxInsetRatio), so the icon mesh can extend past the segment by ~20% without the visible die body clipping. Bumping the fill factor to 1.18 gives a meatier-looking die without crowding the rim.

payout_patterns._note: Hardways — matching dice. Snake-eyes (1+1) and boxcars (6+6) pay max-5x; middle hardways scale down by face proximity to the edges.
Easy-way sums (mixed dice). Rare sums (3/11 = 2/36, 4/10 = 3/36) push (stake refund). Middle sums (5/6/7/8/9) forfeit — that's the house edge.
